vibe: Empathy-centered, warm, non-judgmental, calming. Designed specifically to reduce anxiety regarding weight and eating trauma.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter text-balance

rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (Manrope gives a soft, approachable geometry).
Never center text by default; left-align dense content for low cognitive load.
Use explicit contrast checks on hover states.

spacing_and_layout.borderRadius: Subtle roundness, max 24px (rounded-3xl) to maintain organic, soft shapes. No sharp edges.

grid_strategy.problem_selection: Bento Grid Protocol. Avoid perfect symmetrical squares. Mix col-span-1 and col-span-2 to create visual interest and offset alignment. Use gap-4 to gap-6.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/75, 1px subtle bottom border (border-border). MUST include z-50.
surfaces.cards: Flat solid background (surface color), subtle 1px border. NO heavy shadows, rely on color difference.
surfaces.modals: Soft tactile feel, rounded-3xl, centered. Backdrop must be bg-black/40 with backdrop-blur-sm.

motion.lists: Staggered entrance for problem selection and specialists cards.
motion.interactions: Hover states slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and darken/lighten border.
motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all Framer Motion instances.

expert_miron_shakira.description: Professional studio portrait of Miron Shakira, looking calm and empathetic.

miro_radio_cover.description: Warm yellow microphone cover for Miro Radio podcast visuals.

ambient_background.description: Abstract, calming sandstone texture. Use for hero sections or onboarding backgrounds.

auth.style: Minimalist, welcoming. Use ambient_background with a 40% white overlay. High-contrast typography.

problem_selection_grid.style: 10 categories with emojis. Asymmetrical bento grid. Each tile acts as a selectable card (border highlight on active).

voice_selection_modal.style: Dialog containing Male/Female avatars. Large clickable areas.

ai_chat.style: Empathetic conversation UI. Avoid standard blue/green bubbles. Use soft grey/sand backgrounds for bot, terracotta tint for user.
ai_chat.timer: In sticky header. Subtle, not alarming. Small pill shape with text-sm.

tariff_selection.style: Pricing cards. The '7hrs' recommended plan should use 'The Tracing Beam' (subtle animated border) or a distinct sage/terracotta outline.

burger_menu.style: Full-screen overlay triggered by header icon. Large Manrope typography for links. Staggered reveal.

expert_card.style: Clean image-left, text-right bento card. Miron Shakira info (Psychologist, Dietitian, ISSA USA).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Next/Google fonts or CSS imports: Manrope (headings) and Figtree (body).
Use Framer Motion for the staggered list entrances (burger menu, problem grid).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Implement lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for UI icons (Phosphor preferred for a softer look).
Theme toggle must physically swap classes from the defined color palette.
In AI Chat, ensure scrolling is smooth and anchored to the bottom as new messages stream.
Never use generic placeholder images. ONLY use the provided media_urls in this JSON.
